name: heart-disease-prediction-intelligent-models
description: Heart disease prediction dashboard using ANN-style scoring, fuzzy risk analysis, and genetic-style feature selection.

scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/src/heartModel.js && node --check backend/src/geneticAlgorithm.js && node --check backend/src/data.js && node --check backend/src/report.js && node --check backend/src/auth.js && node --check backend/src/db.js && node --check frontend/public/app.js && python -m py_compile backend/scripts/train_model.py
